content.title: Sports Courts
content.tagline: Play, Compete, and Create Memories at Home
content.subtitle:
Play, Compete, and Create Memories at Home

Durable, customizable sports Courts by Maxima Concrete. Perfect for basketball, tennis, pickleball, and more. Built for performance and fun.

content.title: Bring the Game Home
content.subtitle: Transform your backyard into a space for recreation, exercise, and family fun with a custom sports court from Maxima Concrete. Built with high-strength materials and expert craftsmanship, our courts are designed to deliver long-lasting performance, durability, and enjoyment.
content.paragraph1: Our sports courts are constructed using 6.5-bag concrete, fiber reinforcement, and 10-gauge wire mesh to create a strong, stable playing surface. This combination helps minimize cracking, improve durability, and withstand years of activity, weather exposure, and heavy use.
content.paragraph2: Whether for basketball, pickleball, tennis, volleyball, or multi-purpose use, each court is tailored to your space and needs. We also offer broom-finished, buff wash, and exposed aggregate finishes, allowing you to choose the appearance, texture, and performance that best fit your project.

content.title: Maxima Concrete: Building Your Dream Court with Lasting Performance

items.text: Withstands years of competitive play, weather exposure, and high activity.
Simply rinse and clean occasionally — no resurfacing or repainting required.
Performs flawlessly through Ohio's hot summers and freezing winters.
We'll tailor your court to fit your space, sport, and style preferences.
Multiple finishes to create a court that enhances your outdoor space.

content.subtitle: Why Choose a Concrete Sports Court?
content.description: As Central Ohio's leading concrete contractor, Maxima Concrete specializes in high-performance sports Courts built for years of enjoyment. Whether you play basketball, tennis, hockey, futsal, pickleball, volleyball, badminton, or rollerblade — your concrete court will deliver exceptional durability and playability.

content.title: Maxima’s Commitment to Quality and Performance

benefits.title: 6.5-Bag High-Strength Mix:
benefits.description: Denser, more durable concrete foundation for long-term stability.

benefits.title: Fiber reinforcement
benefits.description: Prevents cracking and strengthens the slab against constant impact.

benefits.title: 10-Gauge Wire Mesh
benefits.description: Adds another layer of structural support to handle intense activity.

benefits.title: Full-Service Process:
benefits.description: From consultation to completion, our expert team handles design, permits, pouring, finishing, and cleanup.

content.description:
Every court we build is designed to withstand heavy use and harsh weather, while delivering years of safe, enjoyable performance.

Our Quality Standards Include:

items.question: What sports can a concrete court be used for?
items.answer: Basketball, pickleball, tennis, and multi-sport play — we size and finish each court for your game.

items.question: How thick is a concrete sports court?
items.answer: Most courts are poured 4–5 inches thick with reinforcement to handle years of active use.

items.question: Can the court be painted and lined for play?
items.answer: Yes. We can coordinate colored coatings and game lines to finish your court and make it play-ready.

items.question: Do you offer free consultations?
items.answer: Yes — we provide free on-site consultations and estimates anywhere in Central Ohio.
